data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement that eligibility filters by resource type/capability/location/custom subject are implemented. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the existence or functionality of these filters. The linked use case mentions the need for these filters, but without concrete evidence of their implementation, the requirement is deemed unmet, indicating a gap in the system.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of eligibility filters by resource type/capability/location/custom subject.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the implementation of eligibility filters.
